grip: BLOCKED (exit 1)
planes: contract · governed modules: 2 · ungoverned: 0

blocking violations (1):
  ✖ [contract.breaking-api] src/checkout (src/checkout/routes.ts:20) — module src/checkout's api contract renames coupon → couponCode at src/checkout/routes.ts:20, which the mobile-app consumer depends on — restore it or run `grip ratify contract src/checkout` to accept the new contract once api consumers are updated.
